scenarios.title: Molecular Design CLI Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks for REINVENT4, reinvent CLI configs, molecule generation, scoring, transfer learning, staged RL, enumeration, plugins, or SMILES preprocessing.
scenarios.role: Routes REINVENT4 molecular design tasks to focused workflow sub-skills with self-contained config, validation, and troubleshooting guidance.
scenarios.read_when: REINVENT4, reinvent, reinvent_datapre, sampling.toml, scoring.toml, transfer_learning.toml, staged_learning.toml, data_pipeline.toml, enumeration.toml, LibInvent, LinkInvent, Mol2Mol, PepInvent, scoring component, comp_ plugin, @add_tag, RDKit, OpenEye, Chemprop
scenarios.best_for: Preparing and validating REINVENT4 run configs, choosing CLI flags, designing scoring functions/plugins, preprocessing SMILES, and troubleshooting optional dependencies without reopening the source repo.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is general cheminformatics unrelated to REINVENT4, asks to reproduce the REINVENT4 paper from scratch, or requires long production training/external scoring execution without user approval.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `reinvent4` for practical REINVENT4 repository usage and route by run_type or CLI name; use sampling for generation, scoring for components/plugins, learning for TL/RL, data-pipeline for reinvent_datapre, and enumeration for peptide/library seed workflows.
